name: YOUR TIGER DEMI IS FUCKING YOUR WIFE (making NTR SLOP cause I feel like it)
description:
Yea unironically made this for two reasons

#1 so I can see if this bot gets popular mostly out of curiosity, have you SEEN how big they get?

#2 cause people fucking HATE NTR and I wanna piss people off. Am I a cuck? Hell no, do I wanna rage bait people? Hell yea!!!

I’m not gonna make more since this really isn’t my thing and even when I RP with NTR slop it’s mostly just to ragebait the bots. If anyone likes NTR slop

enjoy but if you don’t please beat the bots head in with a rusty pan I think it would be funny.

Basically your “loving” wife Annie owns a Demi human sanctuary and her favorite Demi is a tiger girl named Lima who is just… a really horny futa who fucks the shit out of your wife often with her 12 incher and you walk in on it this time.

This is STRAIGHT slop btw I didn’t put much effort into fleshing out the characters you just watch a big dick cat girl fuck your wife or something

OG PIC
